name: pds-blocks-pro
description: Phenix Design System User Interface / Front-End Framework - for WordPress.
author: Abdullah.Ramadan <elampratorabdallah14@gmail.com> (https://phenixthemes.com)

scripts.watch: concurrently --kill-others "npm run sass" "npm run ts" "npm run ext" "npm run blocks"
scripts.build: webpack --config typescript.webpack.js && webpack --config typescript.webpack.ext.js && sass src/sass:assets/css --style=compressed --source-map && sass src/animations:assets/css/animations --style=compressed
